name: Real Property Information
description: City real-property records including parcel-linked ownership and assessment context.

name: Parcel
description: Official parcel boundaries used as base land-unit geometry.

name: Vacant Building Notices
description: Properties flagged with vacant-building notices and related status fields.

name: Vacant Building Rehabs
description: Vacant-building rehabilitation permit activity and project signals.

name: Tax Lien Certificate Sale Properties
description: Properties listed for tax lien certificate sale processes.

name: 2021 Tax Sale List
description: Published 2021 tax sale list for delinquent properties.

name: Open Bid List - Vacants to Value
description: Open bids for Vacants to Value redevelopment opportunities.

name: Completed City Demo
description: Locations where city demolition work has been completed.

name: Housing and Building Permits 2019-Present
description: Housing and building permits from 2019 to present.

name: Zoning
description: Current zoning districts and zoning-code geography.

name: Streets
description: Street centerlines for Baltimore City road network geometry and attributes.

name: Major Drainage
description: Major drainage network and watershed-related infrastructure geometry.

name: Water (Infrastructure Layer 19)
description: Water infrastructure features from city infrastructure map layer 19.

name: Rate of Clogged Storm Drain Reports (CSA)
description: CSA-level rate of clogged storm drain service reports.

name: Median Price of Homes Sold (CSA)
description: CSA-level median home sale price indicator.

name: Total Number of Businesses (CSA)
description: CSA-level total count of registered businesses.

name: NIBRS Group A Crime Data (2022-Present)
description: NIBRS Group A incident-level crime data (2022-present).

name: Part 1 Crime Data (Legacy SRS)
description: Legacy Part I (SRS-era) crime incidents for historical trend analysis.
